title: The Last Magic Show
overview: An emotionally traumatized stage magician has "escaped" into a fantasy world where he has real magical powers, but  his career has taken him to performing at childrens' birthday parties. However, if he can find another stage assistant,  his sleezy manager will give him another stage opportunity. Mostly he needs to find his way out of his mental state and  that path is guided by some unexpected people he meets.
